It is a symbol for peace.
It is one of the most beautiful works of art in Florentin.
KnownAs: It is known as The Peace Kids.
It is known as The Peace Kids Mural.
KnownFor: It is known for depicting Srulik and Handala embracing.
It is known for its message of peace.

It is known for its dual creation in Palestine and Israel.
